senses.definition: a public performance by musicians or singers

examples.x: After the concert, the band met with fans for autographs.
He's always wanted to see his favorite band perform in concert.
The live concert was broadcast on national television.
The school is hosting a concert to showcase the students' musical talents.

senses.definition: a performance of live music, comedy, or other entertainment, usually by one or more performers in front of an audience

examples.x: The band played a fantastic gig at the local club last night.
She booked a gig at a popular venue to promote her new album.
The comedian’s gig was well-received, with the audience laughing throughout.
The gig was a great opportunity for the young artist to showcase their talent.
After months of practice, they were excited for their first gig in front of a live audience.

senses.definition: a performance or segment within an event, featuring one or more artists presenting their music to an audience

examples.x: The headline act drew in the largest crowd at the music festival.
The solo act on stage captivated the audience with their heartfelt ballads.
Local talent often gets a chance to shine as the opening act for bigger bands.
The closing act brought the night to a memorable end with their high-energy performance.
The opening act set the tone for the concert with their electrifying performance, leaving the audience eager for more.

senses.definition: an informal gathering of musicians who come together to play music spontaneously
a musical scene in a movie or play in which all or nearly all of the cast dance and sing
a public performance of music or poetry by an individual or a small group

examples.x: She performed a beautiful piano recital at the concert hall.
The poetry recital featured some of the best local poets.
The students held a recital to showcase what they had learned in music class.
He was nervous before his first recital, but the audience gave him a standing ovation.
He prepared for his recital by practicing daily for several weeks.

senses.definition: a series of performances of music, plays, movies, etc. typically taking place in the same location every year

examples.x: The comedy festival was filled with laughter and cheer.
The dance festival featured performances from around the world.
They attended a cultural festival held in their town.

senses.definition: a series of concerts held in different locations

examples.x: She's excited to see her favorite musician on tour this fall.
She's joining the pop star's tour as a backup singer.
The band announced their summer tour, which includes stops in several European cities.
The jazz musician's tour includes a mix of large concerts and intimate performances.
The famous rock band announced a world tour, including stops in major cities across North America, Europe, and Asia.

senses.definition: a classical music concert where the audience is not seated and is free to move around during the performance, often held in a large open space or designated area
a live musical performance featuring a band or artist playing rock music

examples.x: They attended a rock concert last weekend and had an amazing time.
The rock concert drew a large crowd of enthusiastic fans.
He has never missed a rock concert in his city.
She bought tickets for the rock concert months in advance.
A rock concert can last for several hours, depending on the band's setlist.

senses.definition: a representation that an actor or a performer gives of an artistic or musical piece that shows their understanding and feeling toward it

examples.x: His interpretation of the character brought new depth and complexity to the stage production, earning him critical acclaim.
The actor's interpretation of the Shakespearean soliloquy was riveting, drawing the audience into the character's inner turmoil.
The singer's interpretation of the ballad moved listeners to tears, evoking a sense of nostalgia and longing.
The dancer's interpretation of the choreography was both graceful and powerful, conveying a range of emotions through movement.
The comedian's interpretation of the classic joke had the audience roaring with laughter, demonstrating his comedic timing and wit.
